title: Bizarre West
description: Face the bizarre world of wild west
body: # Bizarre West Go on an adventure in the desert, complete all the achievements and have a fun time exploring the world of the Wild West. ![preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a3ae56e60f816d37baca362ac66095159c9cf821.jpeg) ## Descpription ### Biome Westworld is a single biome of endless desert with canyons and inaccessible cliffs. ### Items One of the important parts of the mod are items. All items that may be needed in the Wild West will appear in chests located in structures. Of the unique items that are in the mod, we can highlight the revolver, shotgun, Winchester and cartridges for them. ![Reloading a revolver](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/8yT8Rlev/images/5ca10a18be2031426b8fe49757de9ace34f8e759.gif) ### Mobs Just like the structures, the mod has vanilla mobs, as well as unique ones for the mod. Horses, mules, armadillos, and others may appear in the desert. Civilians will also appear in the cities, and bandits led by a bandit chieftain will appear in the camps. An equally important mob is the tumbleweed. ### Structures There are many structures in the Wild West world. There are both vanilla structures and unique ones for the mod. There are four main structures in the mod: * Town * Bandit Camp * Horse Station * Railway Station
